title: Compound Interests — Project Manifest v1
description: The keystone of the hub-and-spoke contract (BUILD_BRIEF §3.2, §3.3). Every project publishes exactly one manifest. A typo'd manifest must FAIL the build, not render a broken tile.

schema_version.description: Manifest schema version. Bump only on breaking schema changes.

slug.description: URL-safe identifier. Must match the project directory name and the page route.

tagline.description: One sentence. Direct, engineering-forward, quantified, no hype.

status.description: Set by the owner; auto-overridden to 'dormant' if no heartbeat in 14 days (§9.4).

maturity.description: 1-5. Honest maturity; tiles may render this as a progress treatment.

last_heartbeat.description: ISO-8601 date or date-time of the project's last sign of life. Optional; populated by the P2 heartbeat layer. Drives the StatusBadge staleness note and the 14-day dormant invariant (§3.3 / §9.4).

last_report.description: Heartbeat contract (BUILD-AUDIT-round1 §D): ISO-8601 UTC of the system's last telemetry report, or null if it has never reported. Drives the live-dot state (reporting / stale / awaiting).

last_activity.description: One-line activity summary for the newest-first ticker (optional).

metric_values.description: Real metric VALUES keyed by metrics[].key. A metric row renders only when its value exists here — no placeholder dashes (BUILD-AUDIT-round1 §3).

tile_media.description: Optional homepage 'living window' tile media — an absolute path to a real, recent screenshot/loop of the system (never a fabricated feed). When set, ProjectCard renders it as the tile image; when absent, the card renders as today (ph-43).

accent.description: Per-project accent token name (one accent color per project, §4.5).

ai_roles.description: Named agent roles (monitor, red-team, committee-chair, coach...). Recurs across projects -> feeds the Patterns page.

loops.description: The 'I build systems' proof. Renders directly into the Loops table (§4.3 #3).

automation.description: Human-in-the-loop posture. The single most employer-impressive field on the site.

demo.description: Every project must declare something. 'fallback' is MANDATORY for embeds (R2).

metrics.description: Headline metric definitions. Keys map to heartbeat payload keys (§3.3).

patterns.description: Tags from the §4.4 pattern vocabulary. Enumerated so a typo'd tag fails the build (CLAUDE.md). Add a new value here when a genuinely new pattern is introduced.
